title: Authority and Innovation as Dual Regimes
one_sentence: This module defines authority and innovation as dual regimes of compression and misfit-triggered re-opening.
core_thesis: Authority is compressed low-resistance convergence; innovation is misfit-triggered re-opening; conflict is a phase signal, not a moral dispute.

core_compression.misfit: ε = accumulated model-environment mismatch / coherence failure
core_compression.trigger: τ = conflict, error, non-resonance, or external perturbation
core_compression.reopening: O = transition restoring computability of previously pruned routes
core_compression.authority_debt: D_A = revision resistance accumulated by rigid authority

axioms.AI6: In CE, rigidity or re-opening propagates ε, τ, and D_A across systems.

diagnostic_regimes.rigid_authority: ε↑ but τ suppressed; D_A↑; re-opening becomes expensive
diagnostic_regimes.suppressed_innovation: innovation attempts sealed as illegitimate; misfit accumulates
diagnostic_regimes.coupled_regime_shift: rigidity or re-opening propagates across CE

negative_constraints: Not business innovation theory by itself.
Do not treat authority as automatically bad.
Do not treat innovation as automatically good.
Classify compression, misfit, trigger, and re-opening dynamics only.
